title: Fixed-center Earth scale coherence and non-image diagnostics
summary: Stabilized /cosmos-review around a fixed Earth center, introduced shared scale uniforms, converted clouds to spherical shell altitude logic, added ocean/cloud/planet pass alpha diagnostics, and added non-image scale contract scripts for ION-style validation, and replaced reversed-edge shader smoothsteps with explicit inverse fades for more deterministic WebGL behavior.
next: Run local Playwright scale diagnostics/screenshots, then R-0007 atmosphere scattering continuity and cloud LOD refinement.
